paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93, with a change of -5.12% compared to the prior close and -31.52% over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 16, 2026. There have been 5 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance and a $375 million convertibles deal, with one article noting that the bull case for the company may have changed. Another article suggests that the stock may be above fair value after a note offering. The resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns, has also been reported.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K form disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026. There has been one Form 4 filing, and there are 19 proxy solicitation filings in the feed.
